sections.paragraph:
f. with ה parag. poet. יְשׁוּעָתָה Psa 3:3 80:3 (from the root יָשַׁע).

(1) Verbal adj. f. that which is delivered, safe, Isa 26:1, 18 Isa 26:18.

(2) Subst.-(a) deliverance, help; יְשׁוּעַת יְהֹוָה “aid vouchsafed by God,” Exo 14:13.-(b) welfare, Job 30:15.-(c) victory, 1Sa 14:45 2Ch 20:17 Hab 3:8.
